patterns.message: INV-BRP-2 (vendored): BRP code must not import verification-side modules. Aesthetics are a consequence of verification, never an input. The renderer's flow contract is verification → frozen output → BRP renderer → pixels; no arrow goes the other direction.

INV-BRP-2 (vendored): BRP code in src/brp/** must not import from sibling VAPI workspaces. Out-of-band isolation per Decision D1. Pre-ceremony incorporation (OQ-7) is bounded to vendoring + view wiring only.
Decision D3: hash library is viem. ethers is not a dep — see solo/brp-renderer/src/manifest/brp.manifest.json#hash_library.substituted_from.
INV-BRP-2 (vendored): BRP renderer code stays mount-agnostic per Decision D2. The frontend host page (e.g., views/BrpView.jsx) does telemetry wiring; src/brp/** never imports from src/api/.
